title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive health care for women. Services include well baby/child check-ups, annual exams/physicals, immunizations, PAP tests, STD/STI screening and treatment, care for chronic conditions, and general medical care.CenteringPregnancy, a group approach to prenatal care is available at this location. CenteringPregnancy, a group approach to prenatal care, is available at this location. 221 W Stewart Avenue Suite 101 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 618-1300 Main phone (541) 690-3500 Care Team (541) 535-6239 Alternate After-hours nurse Main phone (541) 618-1300 Main (541) 690-3500 Care Team After-hours nurse line (541) 535-6239 After-hours nurse INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Rogue Valley Transportation District bus stop nearby Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
